requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — COGUANOR Adoption / Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——COGUANOR采标 / 项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——COGUANOR採標 / 項目證據

summary.en: COGUANOR is Guatemala's national standards body and can adopt or reference international standards for Guatemalan use. For EV supply equipment, the relevant international safety baseline is IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging general requirements, with IEC 61851-23 for DC charging stations and IEC 61851-24 for DC charging communication where applicable. Even where a Guatemala-specific mandatory EVSE product rule is not publicly confirmed, project owners, distributors, insurers, and conformity bodies may require IEC-family safety reports covering control pilot behavior, protective earthing, insulation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent protection, over-temperature protection, emergency stop provisions where applicable, enclosure protection, and installation instructions.
summary.zh: COGUANOR是危地马拉国家标准机构，可在危地马拉采用或引用国际标准。对于电动汽车供电设备，相关国际安全基线为IEC 61851-1传导充电通用要求；直流充电站适用IEC 61851-23，适用时还包括IEC 61851-24直流充电通信。即使尚未从公开官方来源确认危地马拉特定EVSE强制产品规则，项目业主、配电商、保险方和合格评定机构也可能要求IEC体系安全报告，覆盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流保护、过温保护、适用时的急停措施、外壳防护和安装说明。
summary.zht: COGUANOR是瓜地馬拉國家標準機構，可在瓜地馬拉採用或引用國際標準。對於電動汽車供電設備，相關國際安全基線為IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用要求；直流充電站適用IEC 61851-23，適用時還包括IEC 61851-24直流充電通訊。即使尚未從公開官方來源確認瓜地馬拉特定EVSE強制產品規則，項目業主、配電商、保險方和合格評定機構也可能要求IEC體系安全報告，覆蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流保護、過溫保護、適用時的急停措施、外殼防護和安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: COGUANOR national standardization and conformity functions
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which is structurally related to IEC 61851-1 but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication choices. GB/T evidence can support an engineering gap review, but it does not by itself demonstrate IEC 61851 conformity for a Guatemala-facing project or any COGUANOR-adopted route.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上与IEC 61851-1相关，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信选择。GB/T证据可支持工程差距审查，但其本身不能证明面向危地马拉项目或任何COGUANOR采标路径的IEC 61851符合性。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上與IEC 61851-1相關，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊選擇。GB/T證據可支持工程差距審查，但其本身不能證明面向瓜地馬拉項目或任何COGUANOR採標路徑的IEC 61851符合性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, enclosure IP evidence for the Guatemalan installation environment, protective-device ratings, Spanish-language safety and installation instructions, and a clear statement of which COGUANOR-adopted or project-specified standards are claimed. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not enough without clause-level mapping and testing for the target connector and 60 Hz supply.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可的IEC安全测试报告、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、适合危地马拉安装环境的外壳IP证据、保护器件额定值、西班牙语安全和安装说明，以及所声明COGUANOR采标或项目指定标准的清单。若未针对目标接口和60 Hz供电进行逐条映射和测试，单独的GB/T 18487报告并不足够。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可的IEC安全測試報告、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、適合瓜地馬拉安裝環境的外殼IP證據、保護器件額定值、西班牙語安全和安裝說明，以及所聲明COGUANOR採標或項目指定標準的清單。若未針對目標接口和60 Hz供電進行逐條映射和測試，單獨的GB/T 18487報告並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / project-specific — official public sources reviewed did not confirm a single Guatemala whole-unit mandatory EVSE safety certification rule; IEC 61851 evidence should be treated as the practical safety baseline where COGUANOR adoption, tender, insurer, distributor, or project owner requires it
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Guatemala without additional gap assessment and testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 evidence as the practical Guatemala-facing safety baseline, but verify the exact COGUANOR or project route. GB/T 18487.1-2023 is useful for gap mapping, not as a standalone Guatemala safety approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 61851证据视为面向危地马拉的实务安全基线，但须核实具体COGUANOR或项目路径。GB/T 18487.1-2023可用于差距映射，不能单独作为危地马拉安全批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 61851證據視為面向瓜地馬拉的實務安全基線，但須核實具體COGUANOR或項目路徑。GB/T 18487.1-2023可用於差距映射，不能單獨作為瓜地馬拉安全批准。
